---
title: "AEM 7010"
pagetitle: "AEM 7010 · Doing Applied Economics Research"
title-block-style: none
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Hide Quarto's auto title block on the home page */
header.quarto-title-block,
header#title-block-header,
.quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }

/* Hide the docked sidebar on the home page */
#quarto-sidebar,
.sidebar.sidebar-navigation,
nav#quarto-sidebar { display: none !important; }

/* Reclaim the body width that the hidden sidebar was occupying */
main.content,
#quarto-document-content,
.quarto-container > .content {
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

/* ---------- Hero ---------- */
.aem-hero {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2.75rem 1rem 1.25rem;
}
.aem-hero .hero-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.aem-hero .hero-subtitle {
  font-size: 2.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #B31B1B;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
.aem-hero .hero-tagline {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #4A4A4A;
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

/* ---------- Offerings ---------- */
.offerings-label {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  margin: 2.5rem 0 1rem;
}
.offerings {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 0 auto 2rem;
}
.offering {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  border: 1px solid #e2e2dc;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #FAFAF7;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;
}
.offering:hover {
  background: #F7F4E9;
  border-color: #B31B1B;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
.offering .term {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #1B1B1B;
}
.offering .dates {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  margin-left: 0.5rem;
}
.offering .badge {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.offering .badge.current {
  background: #B31B1B;
  color: #fff;
}
.offering .badge.frozen {
  background: #efeee8;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  border: 1px solid #d9d8d2;
}

/* On the home page, keep the Cornell seal in the navbar but hide the course
   title text since the hero already carries it. */
.navbar .navbar-title { display: none !important; }
</style>

<div class="aem-hero">
  <h1 class="hero-title">AEM 7010</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">Doing Applied Economics Research: Practical Skills</p>
  <p class="hero-tagline">A graduate seminar at Cornell on the practical skills behind applied economics research.</p>
</div>

<div class="offerings-label">Offerings</div>

<div class="offerings">

  <a class="offering" href="spring-2026/index.html">
    <span><span class="term">Spring 2026</span><span class="dates">Apr 8 to May 4</span></span>
    <span class="badge current">Most recent</span>
  </a>

</div>
```
